title: MATLAB: Discrete-Time Signals and Systems
summary: The page concludes a discussion of estimating discrete-time system characteristics from an impulse response by computing the approximate time constant and cutoff frequency from a rectangular approximation to h[n]. It then begins Section 3.11 on MATLAB for discrete-time signals and systems, introducing discrete-time function representation and an anonymous MATLAB function for f[n] = e^{-n/5} cos(πn/5)u[n].
